info.description:
YunShu CMDB is an operations CMDB console built with Gin, MySQL, Redis, Casbin, Cobra and slog.
Call the captcha endpoint first, then login with username, password and the 6-digit captcha. Put `Bearer <token>` into the Authorization header afterwards.
info.title: YunShu CMDB API

post.description: Generate a 6-digit login captcha, store it in Redis and return it for the current login flow.
Login with username, password and a Redis-backed 6-digit captcha, then return a JWT access token.
Logout the current user by invalidating the current token.

get.description: Get the profile of the current authenticated user.
Return service name and current environment.
List permissions with optional keyword and pagination filters.

post.description: Create a new permission resource and action pair.

put.description: Update permission name, resource, action or description.

post.description: Bind one permission to one role.

delete.description: Remove one permission from one role.

get.description: List roles with optional keyword and pagination filters.

put.description: Update role name, code, description or status.

get.description: List users with optional keyword and pagination filters.

post.description: Create a new user and optionally bind roles.

put.description: Update user nickname, password or status.
Replace all user roles with the provided role ID list.

BearerAuth.description: Enter the JWT token with the `Bearer ` prefix, for example: Bearer eyJhbGciOi...
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
